scripts.test:e2e: npm --prefix api run test:seed && playwright test
scripts.db:migrate:new: cd packages/db && npx prisma migrate diff --from-empty --to-schema prisma/schema.prisma --script -o ../../api/migrations/0001_init.sql
scripts.db:apply:local: cd api && npx wrangler d1 migrations apply labhive --local
scripts.db:apply:remote: cd api && npx wrangler d1 migrations apply labhive --remote
scripts.db:apply:staging: cd api && npx wrangler d1 migrations apply labhive-staging --remote --env staging
scripts.db:apply:prod: cd api && npx wrangler d1 migrations apply labhive --remote --env production
scripts.db:seed:local: cd api && npx wrangler d1 execute labhive --local --file=./seed.sql
scripts.db:seed:staging: cd api && npx wrangler d1 execute labhive-staging --remote --env staging --file=./seed.sql
scripts.db:seed:demo:local: cd api && npx wrangler d1 execute labhive --local --file=./seed-demo.sql
scripts.db:seed:demo:staging: cd api && npx wrangler d1 execute labhive-staging --remote --env staging --file=./seed-demo.sql
scripts.deploy:api:staging: cd api && npx wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy:api:prod: cd api && npx wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.tail:api:staging: cd api && npx wrangler tail --env staging
scripts.tail:api:prod: cd api && npx wrangler tail --env production
